records.question: Which matches on 2011-04-28 had a win margin of at least 17.0 and featured a man of the match from India?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN player ON match.man_of_the_match = player.player_id
JOIN country ON player.country_name = country.country_id
JOIN country AS country__1 ON country.country_id = country__1.country_id
WHERE country.country_name = 'India' AND match.win_margin >= 17.0 AND match.match_date = '2011-04-28'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.Match_Id
FROM Match AS T1
INNER JOIN Player AS T2
  ON T1.Man_of_the_Match = T2.Player_Id
INNER JOIN Country AS T3
  ON T2.Country_Name = T3.Country_Id
WHERE
  T1.Match_Date = '2011-04-28' AND T1.Win_Margin >= 17.0 AND T3.Country_Name = 'India'

  T1.Match_Id

records.question: Which matches played on 2016-04-25 at Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium had a win margin of at most 25, occurred in seasons up to 2016 with purple cap holders taking at least 299 wickets and orange cap holders scoring exactly 8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE season.season_year <= 2016 AND match.win_margin <= 25.0 AND match.match_date = '2016-04-25' AND venue.venue_name = 'Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium' AND season.purple_cap >= 299 AND season.orange_cap = 8
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  M.Match_Id
FROM Match AS M
JOIN Venue AS V
  ON M.Venue_Id = V.Venue_Id
JOIN Season AS S
  ON M.Season_Id = S.Season_Id
WHERE
  M.Match_Date = '2016-04-25' AND V.Venue_Name = 'Punjab Cricket Association IS Bindra Stadium' AND M.Win_Margin <= 25 AND S.Season_Year <= 2016 AND S.Purple_Cap IN (
    SELECT
      WT.Player_Out
    FROM Wicket_Taken AS WT
    GROUP BY
      WT.Player_Out
    HAVING
      COUNT(WT.Player_Out) >= 299
  ) AND S.Orange_Cap IN (
    SELECT
      BBB.Striker
    FROM Ball_by_Ball AS BBB
    JOIN Batsman_Scored AS BS
      ON BBB.Match_Id = BS.Match_Id AND BBB.Over_Id = BS.Over_Id AND BBB.Ball_Id = BS.Ball_Id AND BBB.Innings_No = BS.Innings_No
    GROUP BY
      BBB.Striker
    HAVING
      SUM(BS.Runs_Scored) = 8
  )

records.question: Which matches played at Punjab Cricket Association Stadium since April 20, 2012 are from seasons with at least 190 purple cap wickets, where the man of the series is exactly 315 and the season year is at least 2012?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id
JOIN venue ON match.venue_id = venue.venue_id
WHERE season.purple_cap >= 190 AND match.match_date >= '2012-04-20' AND season.man_of_the_series = 315 AND season.season_year >= 2012 AND venue.venue_name = 'Punjab Cricket Association Stadium'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.Match_Id
FROM Match AS T1
INNER JOIN Venue AS T2
  ON T1.Venue_Id = T2.Venue_Id
INNER JOIN Season AS T3
  ON T1.Season_Id = T3.Season_Id
WHERE
  T2.Venue_Name = 'Punjab Cricket Association Stadium' AND T1.Match_Date >= '2012-04-20' AND T3.Man_of_the_Series = 315 AND T3.Season_Year >= 2012 AND T3.Season_Id IN (
    SELECT
      T4.Season_Id
    FROM Season AS T4
    INNER JOIN Match AS T5
      ON T4.Season_Id = T5.Season_Id
    INNER JOIN Ball_by_Ball AS T6
      ON T5.Match_Id = T6.Match_Id
    INNER JOIN Wicket_Taken AS T7
      ON T6.Match_Id = T7.Match_Id AND T6.Over_Id = T7.Over_Id AND T6.Ball_Id = T7.Ball_Id AND T6.Innings_No = T7.Innings_No
    WHERE
      T6.Bowler = T4.Purple_Cap
    GROUP BY
      T4.Season_Id,
      T4.Purple_Cap
    HAVING
      COUNT(T7.Match_Id) >= 190
  )
